docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FESTA JIACOMO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ LUCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FESTA JIACOMO DEF TO DELIVER TO PLFT EITHER A RECEIPT FR SF WATE R DEPT SHOWING PAYMENT OF $49.97 OR CASH PAYMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT FESTA JIACOMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
